title: KERALA
subtitle: God's Own Country
description: Experience the serene backwaters of Kerala on a traditional houseboat. Navigate through lush green landscapes, palm-fringed canals, and enjoy the tranquil beauty of South India.

title: RAJASTHAN
subtitle: Land of Kings
description: Immerse yourself in the majestic forts, opulent palaces, and rich cultural heritage of Rajasthan. A journey through the golden sands of the Thar Desert awaits.

title: ANDAMAN
subtitle: Tropical Paradise
description: Discover the untouched beauty of the Andaman Islands. Crystal clear waters, white sandy beaches, and vibrant coral reefs make it a perfect tropical escape.

title: LADAKH
subtitle: High Altitude Desert
description: Explore the rugged beauty of Ladakh, with its breathtaking landscapes, high mountain passes, and serene Buddhist monasteries nestled in the Himalayas.

title: GOA
subtitle: Sun, Sand & Sea
description: Relax on the sun-kissed beaches of Goa. Enjoy the vibrant nightlife, Portuguese heritage architecture, and a laid-back coastal lifestyle.
